name: mlx-vlm-skills
description: Skills for running, serving, optimizing, and extending MLX-VLM models on Apple silicon.

interface.shortDescription: Run, serve, optimize, and extend MLX-VLM models
interface.longDescription: Skills for working effectively with MLX-VLM on Apple silicon, covering multimodal inference workflows, model-family integration, server behavior, batching, caching, quantization, and speculative decoding.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the MLX-VLM skills to help run, serve, optimize, or extend models in this repository.
